statement: In every magma, Equation 148 (`x = y * ((z * w) * z)`) implies Equation 1874 (`x = (x * (y * z)) * (y * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0849
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z w) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op x (op y z)) (op y w))
